channel.title: jpcite — release milestone feed
channel.description: jpcite Wave 50-58 release milestones — RC1 contract layer, Wave 51 dim K-S, AWS canary infra, packet catalog growth (14 → 92 outcomes).

item.title: Wave 58 — 10 relationship packets (catalog 82 → 92)
item.description: 10 relationship-class packet generators landed; outcome catalog grew to 92 entries across 4 public surfaces (site/.well-known/openapi/MCP).

item.title: Wave 57 — 10 geographic packets (catalog 72 → 82)
item.description: 10 geographic-cohort packet generators (prefecture / municipality / region cross-source) added to the outcome catalog.

item.title: Wave 56 — 10 time-series packets (catalog 62 → 72)
item.description: 10 time-series packet generators (program amendment lineage / acceptance cohort over time / enforcement trend) landed.

item.title: Wave 55 — 10 cross-3-source analytics packets (catalog 52 → 62)
item.description: 10 cross-3-source analytics packets join programs × adoptions × enforcement to produce composed evidence packets.

item.title: Wave 54 — 10 additional cross-source packets (catalog 42 → 52)
item.description: 10 additional cross-source packet generators landed; AWS canary Phase 6 cost burn ramp armed alongside.

item.title: Wave 53 — 16 packet generators (cross-source deep analysis)
item.description: Wave 53 / 53.2 / 53.3 — 16 packet generators total (enforcement / invoice / vendor / radar / timeline + 11 remaining + 10 deep cross-source) uploaded full-scale to S3.

item.title: Wave 51 — dim K-S 9/9 + L1+L2 landed
item.description: Wave 51 tick 0: predictive / session / rule_tree / anonymized / explainable / composable / time_machine / federated_mcp / copilot_scaffold (9 modules) + L1 source family + L2 math sweep. 11 modules, ~360 tests added, mypy strict 0.

item.title: Wave 50 — RC1 contract layer LANDED (7/7 production gate)
item.description: Wave 50 RC1 LANDED: agent_runtime/contracts.py 19 Pydantic models + 20 JPCIR JSON schemas + 14 outcome contracts (¥300-¥900 band) + 5 preflight gate artifacts + AWS teardown 7 scripts (30 tests PASS) + Cloudflare Pages rollback 5 scripts (11 tests PASS). Production deploy readiness gate 7/7, mypy strict 0, pytest 9300+ PASS, acceptance 15/15 PASS.

item.title: RC1 release capsule — rc1-p0-bootstrap-2026-05-15
item.description: RC1 P0 bootstrap capsule published: release_capsule_manifest.json SHA256 78b24c633b06660acc3ca1200084ab0c88769498fdfd3961d91d97029e36871c. 14 outcome contracts + JPCIR contracts + algorithm blueprints + spend simulation + teardown simulation. live_aws_commands_allowed=false (absolute).
